name: invoice-parser

evaluation.summary: Clear purpose: parse PDF invoices to JSON.

security_summary: No threats detected across malicious scripts, credential harvesting, suspicious dependencies, obfuscation, network abuse, crypto mining, vulnerabilities, or unsafe permissions.

business_applications: Feed the Executive Inbox's invoice handling

implementation_roadmap.name: Integrate
implementation_roadmap.goal: Wrap the library behind an agent

required_agents.purpose: Use parsed invoices in finance workflows

business_case.estimated_roi: High — removes manual invoice data entry across businesses.

explanation: Static scan only — nothing was executed. Clean security review and solid quality; SAFE. Generated a finance-focused business case and recommended a parsing agent.
